I'm not falling for that

Pink Lily: Sorry, I'm not sure I understand. Is your text meant for me? If so, I totally understand where you're coming from! It sounds like the message just isn't connecting for you. I appreciate your honesty and feedback, and if the current offers aren't what you're looking for, no worries, our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so please keep an eye out! In the meantime, check out our sales collection here: https://pinklily.attn.tv/aqf24oWgBsyb

Feel free to reach out if you ever need help with anything or if you have any questions or concerns related to our products. Happy to help!

conversation.message_text: DreamCloud: Reply Y to subscribe to recurring automated personalized marketing alerts (e.g. cart reminders) from DreamCloud.
DreamCloud: Welcome! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Phone support: (833) 237-3269.
DreamCloud: You're in (& your deal is here)!

DreamCloud: Upgrade your old mattress for less. Save up to 60% + free shipping & returns.

Claim your savings: dreamcloud.attn.tv/ay1Mbk2nS7eL .

DreamCloud: Hello, this is Sam. Thanks for checking out DreamCloud. You can save up to 60% on mattresses, so you're shopping at a great time. dreamcloud.attn.tv/aEYPEqZq3a91

Any questions I can answer for you?
.
How do I save 60%?
DreamCloud: Please check our website, dreamcloudsleep.com, for the most up-to-date promotions and sales. You'll be the first to hear about new promotions!
It said if I signed up for emails and texts, that I would get 60% off.
Is that true or not, Sam?
DreamCloud: Please note that the discount is already applied on the product page! Do you mind sharing a screenshot of what you're seeing on your end so I can check?

send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

Caraa: Hi Harbani! I'm Sarah, your personal shopping assistant.

I'm here to answer any questions, share recommendations, or assist in any way. What can I help you with today?

https://caraa.attn.tv/aiZJiX3cohDL .
hi. I wanted to return my bag/order

Caraa: Thanks for reaching out! We offer returns and exchanges on new and unused items within 21 days of shipment, excluding final sale items (masks, croco, vaqueta, sale). You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://caraa.attn.tv/aQoTUwWkfi4S
